subject: feat(data): fix all 9 extraction pipeline gaps + implement reverse geocode
body:
Transform script (gaps #1, #5, #6, #7):
- Support way/relation elements via extractCoordinates() + buildSourceId()
- Replace bbox with area["ISO3166-1"="ZA"] Overpass area filter
- Add province abbreviations (GP, WC, EC, etc.) to PROVINCE_MAP
- Wrap batch files as {"stations": [...]} matching RPC input format
- Output skipped elements to stations-osm-skipped.json for geocoding

Migrations (gaps #2, #3, #4):
- 20260322000001: Partial unique index on source_id
- 20260322000002: Upsert RPC — insert new + update existing by source_id
- 20260322000003: reconcile_stations() + deactivate_stations() functions

Reverse geocode script (gaps #8, #9):
- Full implementation with Nominatim rate limiting (1.1s/req)
- Incremental cache, retry with backoff, country_code validation
- City fallback chain, progress reporting with ETA

Tags: data, osm, nominatim, supabase, pipeline
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: data-extraction
Semver: minor

title: fix all 9 extraction pipeline gaps + implement reverse geocode
